div.head:
No. 567.
Mr. Lewis to Mr. Bayard.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
Lisbon, March 29, 1887. (Received April 11.)

div.p: Sir: I have the honor to transmit inclosed an official copy and translation thereof of the protocol of a treatyPublished page 213, supra. between Portugal and China. Whilst the former Government has been in possession of Macoa for over three hundred years, there has never been a treaty between the two countries.
I am informed by Mr. Campbell, the agent for the Chinese Government, that the treaty will be ratified in the course of the next three months.
